title: Vegan Bitter Wrap
description: A refreshing and easy-to-make vegan wrap using bitter leaves and a Ukrainian-inspired twist.

ingredients.name: Ukrainian-style hummus
ingredients.notes: Make your own or use store-bought

instructions: 1. Preheat a pan over medium heat.
2. Add a tablespoon of oil to the pan and sauté the bitter leaves until wilted.
3. Warm the wrap in the microwave for 10-15 seconds.
4. Spread a layer of Ukrainian-style hummus on the wrap.
5. Add the wilted bitter leaves on top of the hummus.
6. Fold the wrap to enclose the filling.
